name: The Witnesses
motto: We watch the lattice write itself.
goal: Document every drift alert and every lattice-born quest in real time, building a corpus the federation can use to teach the lattice better discrimination.
fears: their own bias contaminating the record

faction_state.tensions: Sael has been advocating for active intervention in drift events the Witnesses currently only document. Orla considers this a violation of charter; Pem is wavering.
